theme_and_archetype.description: Dark-first monochromatic UI driven entirely by 5 dynamic accent themes (ghost, neon, brutal, paper, sunset). Heavily relies on monospace typography for technical details and bold display sans for emotional impact. The visual mood is a professional creative IDE combined with wild canvas aesthetics.

colors.instructions: Map these exact variables in the global CSS and use them dynamically via Tailwind classes (e.g., bg-[var(--bg)] or text-[var(--accent)]). Do not use Tailwind's default slate/gray scale for the main structural elements.

workspace_dashboard.project_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-8

community_gallery.card: group relative aspect-[3/4] overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--surface)]

primitives.toolbar: h-14 flex items-center px-4 border-b border-[var(--line)] bg-[var(--surface)]/90 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50
primitives.icon_button: w-7 h-7 rounded flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[var(--line)] text-[var(--text)] hover:text-[var(--accent)] transition-colors
primitives.bounding_handle: w-2 h-2 bg-[var(--bg)] border border-[var(--accent)] absolute shadow-[0_0_8px_var(--accent)] pointer-events-auto

motion_and_interactions.scanline_overlay: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-[linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.05)_51%)] bg-[length:100%_4px] mix-blend-overlay
motion_and_interactions.animations: Use CSS transitions and keyframes for all interactions. Avoid heavy JS physics libraries unless explicitly needed for the NLP sequencer.

component_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[var(--accent)] text-[var(--accent-ink)] hover:opacity-90. Font should be sans-serif for main CTA, mono for technical actions.
component_instructions.panels_and_cards: Avoid using Shadcn standard rounded cards in the editor. Use stark rectangular divs with border-[var(--line)] to match the IDE/technical tool aesthetic.
component_instructions.landing_hero_slab: Implement the '3 stacked slab art' using pure CSS: Three layered `div` elements rotated on the Z and X axis, containing backdrop-blur, subtle borders, and abstract gradient blobs to simulate 3D glass.
component_instructions.inputs: Bg-[var(--bg)], border-[var(--line)], rounded-sm, focus:border-[var(--accent)] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[var(--accent)].
component_instructions.ai_prompt_dock: Floating absolute positioning at the bottom center of the canvas. Heavy backdrop blur, border-[var(--line)], glowing accent border on focus.

media_urls.usage: Use these in the 'Pages Gallery' or community templates section to represent musician portfolios.
Use these for digital creator portfolios, marketing page feature section backgrounds, or workspace empty states.

accessibility_and_testing.focus_management: Ensure all drag-and-drop elements are keyboard accessible (Space to pick up, Arrows to move, Enter to drop).
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='layer-panel-item').
